sizing_rule.note: Risk maximum 5% of account equity per trade to prevent catastrophic loss. Entry requires documented emotional discipline over 50+ trades and pre-calculated max loss per trade.

source_rule_text: A trader must limit position size to prevent catastrophic loss from a single adverse move, regardless of how favorable the overall odds are, because psychological factors (greed, misunderstanding risk) cause traders to risk excessive capital and face compounding recovery requirements.
